_comment: CloudFront distribution config reference. Use this as a guide when creating the distribution in the AWS Console or via CLI. Replace all PLACEHOLDER values.

Origins._comment: Next.js web app running on Lightsail (port 3001 via Nginx on port 80)
NestJS API running on Lightsail (port 3000 via Nginx on port 80, path /api/*)

DefaultCacheBehavior._comment_cache_policy: CachingDisabled — use this for SSR pages so Next.js controls caching
DefaultCacheBehavior._comment_origin_policy: AllViewerExceptHostHeader — forwards cookies, query strings, headers

CacheBehaviors._comment: API calls — never cache, forward all headers and cookies
Next.js static assets — long cache (1 year), immutable
CacheBehaviors._comment_cache_policy: CachingOptimized — 1 year TTL for immutable static assets

_comment_price_class: US, Canada, Europe only — cheapest. Use PriceClass_All for global.

ViewerCertificate._comment: Use ACM certificate in us-east-1 (required for CloudFront)

CustomErrorResponses._comment: Return index for client-side routing (Next.js handles 404s itself)
